Service Hub

Cabinetry by Timber & Testament

Custom cabinetry built and installed for practical daily use. Custom cabinetry improves room function with tailored dimensions, durable hardware, and layout-first planning for kitchens, utility spaces, libraries, and built-in storage zones.

Where Cabinetry Adds Value

Cabinetry is commonly used in kitchens, mudrooms, laundry rooms, home offices where homeowners need better function and stronger finish quality.

  • kitchen support cabinetry
  • home office storage
  • laundry storage
  • entry drop zones

Benefits and Materials

Key benefits include more organized storage, improved workflow, durable long-term use. Material selection often includes maple, oak, paint-grade hardwood, soft-close hardware based on wear expectations and visual goals.

Typical process sequence: site measurement, cabinet layout planning, shop assembly, finish-level installation.

FAQ: Cabinetry

Do you offer cabinetry across Southeast Tennessee?

Yes. We provide cabinetry across Cleveland and surrounding communities with route coverage throughout the greater service area.

How long does custom cabinetry installation usually take?

Timeline depends on design complexity and fabrication requirements. Most projects are scoped with clear consultation, fabrication, and install phases.

Plan Your Cabinetry Project

Call 865-599-9531 or request a scoped estimate for cabinetry across Southeast Tennessee.
